testcase.name: Login exitoso con credenciales válidas

error.message: The following error occurred: target frame detached (failed to check if window was closed: disconnected: Unable to receive message from renderer) (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.76) (error code: "target frame detached") Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [aa58a9c79eaebc433617f0d5612c30df, findElement {value=//a[@href='/login'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.76, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.76 (2a4a5f9f74e5..., userDataDir: C:\Users\x13661\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58931}, goog:processID: 6364, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58931/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.76, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: aa58a9c79eaebc433617f0d5612c30df
